calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jan-08-2026 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-29-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions Admitted And Of Nonappearance
Off Calendar Sep-10-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.'s Motion To Deem Requests For Admissions Admitted is GRANTED.

Under CCP 2033.280(c), the court shall deem requests for admissions (RFAs) admitted, unless it finds the responding party, before hearing on the motion, served a proposed response to the requests for admission that is in substantial compliance with CCP 2033.220.

The record here demonstrates Plaintiff sent requests for admissions that appear reasonably calculated to lead to the discovery of admissible evidence. (See Code of Civil Procedure section 2012.010.) Defendant Debbie Gill failed to respond. The record does not demonstrate her failure was reasonable or justified. The requests set out in Plaintiff's Request for Admissions, dated March 21, 2025, are deemed admitted.

Order signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-05-2025 Set For Trial On Jan-12-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
